messages.string: The :attribute must be a text value.
messages.max: The :attribute may not be greater than :max characters.
messages.min: The :attribute must be at least :min characters.
messages.email: Please enter a valid email address.
messages.integer: The :attribute must be a whole number.
messages.boolean: The :attribute must be true or false.
messages.image: The :attribute must be an image (jpg, jpeg, png, webp).
messages.max_file: The :attribute file size may not exceed :max KB.
messages.after_or_equal: The :attribute must be a date after or equal to :date.
messages.before_or_equal: The :attribute must be a date before or equal to :date.
messages.in: The selected :attribute is not a valid option.
messages.regex_name: Only letters, spaces, hyphens, and dots are allowed.
messages.regex_phone: Phone must be a valid Pakistani number (e.g. 03001234567).
messages.regex_code: Code must contain only uppercase letters, numbers, and hyphens.
messages.regex_course: Course code format must be: CS-301 or MATH-1001
messages.regex_slug: Slug can only contain lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens.
